description: Campaign-local approved audio library. Copy generated and curated files into the campaign audio folder, then mark accepted tracks as approved.

tracks.title: Warm Rainy Tavern
tracks.credit: Generated with Suno v5.5 under a Pro account for Codex Questforge.
tracks.prompt: Seamless 30-second dark fantasy RPG ambience loop. Warm medieval tavern interior during rain, soft lute fragments, low indistinct conversation, fireplace crackle, wooden room tone, cozy but mysterious. No lyrics, no clear words, no modern instruments, not cinematic trailer music.
